hero_subtitle: Bridging the gap between pure mathematics, computer science, and real-world engineering to guide the next generation of analytical minds.

about_page.journey_p1: My path to education is built on a foundation of rigorous engineering and pure science. After earning my degree in Shipbuilding Engineering from Istanbul Technical University (ITU), I worked as a designer and engineer on dozens of yacht projects until 2016. Driven by a deep passion for fundamental sciences, I then pivoted my career toward academia.
about_page.journey_p2: This drive led me to Middle East Technical University (METU), where I completed a double major in Mathematics and Computer Engineering. I am currently continuing my academic journey there as a Ph.D. student in Mathematics.
about_page.journey_p3: Since transitioning to education, I have had the privilege of guiding over 100 students in achieving top ranks and maximizing their academic potential. I bring this multifaceted engineering and theoretical perspective into every lesson I teach.
about_page.journey_p4: Having served as an executive in corporate firms for many years and founded my own manufacturing and yacht design companies, my mission extends beyond academic success. I strive to mentor my students, equipping them with a broader vision and strategic mindset for their future professional lives. Underlying all my teaching is a deep commitment to cultivating a mindset aligned with positive global values.
about_page.beyond_p1: Currently based in Ankara, Türkiye, I also believe that a sharp mind requires a balanced life. When I am not tutoring or coding in Python and Java, I immerse myself in the world of social Latin dances, practicing Kizomba and Bachata regularly.
about_page.beyond_p2: I am an avid reader of philosophy, particularly Stoicism, and hold a deep fascination for ancient history. Whether I am capturing moments through photography or exploring new ideas, I approach life with the same curiosity I bring to mathematics.

tutoring_page.giving_back_text: I deeply believe that quality education should be accessible. Subject to my schedule and availability, I provide completely free tutoring sessions for orphaned students. If you or a student you know is in this situation, please do not hesitate to reach out—simply sending a message is enough.
tutoring_page.exam_flexible_desc: Offering both 1-on-1 individual and group sessions. Choose between an 8-week accelerated crash course or a comprehensive 16-week standard program tailored to your exam timeline.
tutoring_page.exam_mock_desc: Every student receives 5 free mock exams simulating real test conditions, followed by comprehensive result evaluation reports to pinpoint areas for improvement.
tutoring_page.exam_strategic_desc: Includes personalized homework and guided solving sessions. Students master the effective use of TI and Desmos calculators, saving crucial time during exams.
tutoring_page.exam_guarantee_desc: Start with a completely Free Trial Lesson to experience the methodology firsthand. I stand by a strict Success Guarantee for students who complete the required program milestones.
tutoring_page.stem_intro_desc: I specialize in providing high-quality, structured tutoring for high school and university students across international curricula. My approach focuses on deep conceptual understanding and rigorous problem-solving.
tutoring_page.box_ap_cs: Computer Science: Computer Science A, Computer Science Principles
tutoring_page.box_ib_math: Mathematics: Analysis and Approaches (AA), Applications and Interpretation (AI) - HL & SL
tutoring_page.box_sat_math: Mathematics: Comprehensive SAT Math preparation, advanced problem-solving, and timing strategies.
tutoring_page.box_uni_math_core: Core Calculus & Analysis: Calculus I-II-III (Multivariable), Advanced Calculus, Real Analysis, Complex Analysis
tutoring_page.box_uni_math_algebra: Algebra & Geometry: Linear Algebra, Abstract Algebra, Differential Geometry
tutoring_page.box_uni_math_applied: Applied & Engineering Math: Ordinary & Partial Differential Equations (ODE & PDE), Numerical Analysis, Engineering Mathematics, Probability & Statistics
tutoring_page.box_uni_cs_core: Core CS & Theory: Data Structures, Algorithm Design, Automata Theory, Discrete Mathematics
tutoring_page.box_uni_cs_systems: Systems & Hardware: Database Systems, Computer Architecture, Circuit Design

contact_page.title: Get in Touch
contact_page.intro: Whether you're looking for tutoring, academic collaboration, or just want to discuss mathematics and computer science, feel free to reach out.

testimonials.t1_text: I am taking AP Calculus lessons, and he is a truly great teacher. The methods he teaches are memorable, and because he introduces new approaches, my perspective on solving questions has genuinely changed.
testimonials.t2_text: I have been taking AP and IB lessons from Sait teacher for 2 years. He explains topics simply and clearly. He patiently repeats parts I don't understand. I am very satisfied. His communication with students is excellent, he always tries to help. It positively affected my participation in classes. Thank you for his efforts.
testimonials.t3_text: He has a great command of the subjects and explains everything through logic. I take AP Computer Science A from him; he tracks my progress regularly and gives assignments for my advancement. He contributed a lot to me, thank you for his efforts.
testimonials.t4_text: I have been taking AP Computer Science A lessons from Sait teacher for about 3 months. He is a detail-oriented teacher who adds plenty of examples to his explanations. He also has a very cautious and guiding attitude towards teaching.
testimonials.t5_text: We have known Sait teacher for about a month. I get help from him for my automata theory course. He is highly successful in both his preparation before our lessons and his planning.
testimonials.t6_text: We take IB mathematics lessons from Sait teacher. He is a very attentive and well-equipped teacher. He explains topics through logic, not by memorization. He establishes excellent communication with students with his sincere approach. He makes even the most difficult topics understandable with a simple explanation. We thank him very much.
testimonials.t7_text: I took tutoring for my linear algebra, calculus 1, and computer architecture courses and found it very useful. I definitely recommend him.
testimonials.t8_text: Mr. Sait is very knowledgeable in his field; he always makes time and finds solutions when I need him for my projects.
testimonials.t9_text: I contacted Sait teacher for my son. His human approach and communication before the lesson were very good. Now they study university mathematics face-to-face. I thank Sait teacher very much.
testimonials.t10_text: As an electrical engineering student at Budapest University of Technology, I took linear algebra lessons from Sait teacher. I think it was very beneficial throughout the semester. I recommend him to everyone.
testimonials.t11_text: Our teacher comes to class very prepared and well-equipped. He explains until there are no question marks left in your mind. He is someone who can explain topics while solving questions and whose lessons are very efficient.
testimonials.t12_text: Our teacher has an exceptional command of C and C++ languages. He is extremely attentive and beautifully answered all my questions step-by-step until I learned them. Everything I exaggerated in my mind now feels very enjoyable. I strongly recommend working with our teacher.
testimonials.t13_text: I requested support from Sait teacher before an exam for my son who studies computer engineering in the Netherlands. Although his schedule was very busy, he didn't turn me down and supported my son late at night. My son was extremely satisfied with the support he received. His communication is excellent and he is highly successful in his field. We thank him very much and wish him continued success.
testimonials.t14_text: I was struggling a lot with differential equations. Thanks to Sait teacher's engineering vision and clear explanations, I passed with a great grade. He is truly a lifesaver.
testimonials.t15_text: I received support from him for my data structures course at Yildiz Technical University. He completely changed my perspective on coding and incredibly broadened my vision.
testimonials.t16_text: I understood the abstract algebra course very easily with Sait teacher's logical and conceptual approach. Thanks to him, I completely overcame my fear of doing complex proofs.
testimonials.t17_text: We had limited time for the SAT Math section. With his pinpoint tactics and time management strategies, I scored even higher than my target.
testimonials.t18_text: I was struggling with physics and calculus courses at my university in Switzerland. Thanks to Sait teacher's patient explanations, I solidified my entire foundation.
testimonials.t19_text: I was drowning in formulas while taking AP Physics C. Sait teacher's calculus-based physics explanation is so unique that everything suddenly made sense.
testimonials.t20_text: We got IB Physics and Mathematics lessons for my daughter. Not only did her grades improve, but she also gained scientific thinking skills. I confidently recommend him to parents.
testimonials.t21_text: The error bound calculations and algorithms in the numerical analysis course were my nightmare. With Sait teacher's practical Python applications, I passed the course very easily.
testimonials.t22_text: I needed a solid math foundation for machine learning algorithms at university. He quickly and wonderfully filled my gaps in statistics and probability.
testimonials.t23_text: During my studies in Canada, I was struggling with my engineering math courses. Even though we were in different time zones, he was always very flexible and supportive.
